question: What encryption does Northbeam use for customer data at rest?
reference_answer: Northbeam encrypts customer data at rest using the AES-256 algorithm [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam encrypts customer data at rest using the AES-256 algorithm.
must_support.supporting_quote: All customer data is encrypted at rest using the AES-256 algorithm and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.

must_not_assert: Northbeam encrypts customer data at rest using 512-bit AES.
